summary: Gruber announces that the Amazon affiliate links on Daring Fireball now properly support international Amazon stores for Canadian and U.K. readers. Visitors who set their preferred Amazon location in the site's preferences page will see Tiger pre-order links pointing to the correct regional store. He notes that while international discounts aren't as generous as the U.S. pricing, they still beat Apple Store prices in those regions. The post is essentially a brief site-housekeeping update combined with a thank-you to readers who support the site through affiliate purchases.
key_points: Daring Fireball's Amazon affiliate links now respect user-selected regional preferences for Canada and the U.K.
International Amazon discounts on Tiger aren't as large as U.S. ones but still undercut Canadian and U.K. Apple Store prices
Gruber thanks readers who support the site by purchasing through his affiliate links
money_quotes: The discounts aren't quite as sweet as those offered by Amazon.com here in the U.S., but they still beat the prices from the Canadian and U.K. Apple Stores.
It's a great way to support this site and save yourself a few bucks at the same time.
key_insight: A minor site update reflecting Gruber's attention to detail in serving his international readership while transparently leveraging affiliate revenue to sustain Daring Fireball.
